header.title: Body Shop FANUC Retrofit — Cell 14
header.title_anonymous: Body Shop FANUC Retrofit — Cell 14 (anonymous Tier-1 OEM)

compensation.invoice_template: AA-standard hourly W-9 with timesheet attestation

scope_summary: Replace 12 FANUC R-2000iC welding robots with R-2000iD in Body Shop Cell 14.
Migrate cell PLC from ControlLogix v20 to v34 with all safety logic.
Re-teach 240 weld points on the new arms; validate cycle time within 1.5% of baseline.
Hand back to Production with full documentation and 2-shift production warranty.
Project window is 6 weeks fixed (May 4 – Jun 12). Cell shutdown is 11 days within that window.
deliverables: Updated Studio 5000 program (.ACD + text export) with full IEC-61131-3 documentation.
FANUC TPP backups for all 12 robots, plus Roboguide simulation file.
I/O list reconciled to as-built (Excel + CSV).
Safety validation per ANSI/RIA R15.06 + plant Functional Safety review.
Knowledge-transfer session with the plant controls team (4 hrs minimum).
requirements_must_have: 5+ years FANUC R-30iB / R-30iD programming, plus iRVision integration.
OSHA-10 or OSHA-30 (cards verified at NDA-sign).
Body-in-White OEM commissioning experience (Detroit-3 or BMW or Toyota).
Available for 11-day shutdown window (continuous on-site, weekend included).
requirements_nice_to_have: Prior Cell 14 experience (rare — a few candidates only).

white_glove_features.label: Customer identity hidden
white_glove_features.detail: Customer name and plant location hidden until applicant shortlisted and NDA signed.

white_glove_features.label: NDA on application
white_glove_features.detail: All applicants must sign a 2-year mutual NDA at application.

white_glove_features.label: Premium concierge
white_glove_features.detail: AA White Glove Concierge owns scheduling, doc routing, payment, and dispute escalation.

white_glove_features.label: Higher visibility
white_glove_features.detail: Boosted to top of feed for 7 days. 30% premium reflected in customer fee, not contractor rate.

white_glove_features.label: Anonymous reviews
white_glove_features.detail: Both sides leave reviews after completion; customer + contractor names hidden in public review text.

white_glove_features.label: Guaranteed payment
white_glove_features.detail: AA escrows 1 week of contracted hours up front; releases weekly per timesheet attestation.
